name: io.github.top-paper-mcp/top-paper-mcp-server
description: Search academic papers from arXiv and top conferences (CVPR, NeurIPS, ICLR, ICML, etc.), download full text via MCP.

packageArguments.name: --storage-path
packageArguments.description: Directory for storing downloaded papers. Defaults to ~/.top-paper-mcp-server/papers.

environmentVariables.name: TOP_PAPER_STORAGE_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Optional path for storing downloaded papers locally.
